title: hypexly-optimized
description: Optimization notably with nvidium support for Sodium 0.6.9+
body:
**hyplexly optimized V4** intends to be the ultimate combination of optimization mods as well as mods that make the game look and feel better. it is inspired by simply optimized. it includes both GPU, CPU and ram optimizations. mods for GPU includes [helium](https://modrinth.com/mod/heliummc), [voxy](https://modrinth.com/mod/voxy), [sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) for CPU  and RAM optimizations it uses [fireite-core](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core), [C2ME](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric), [scalablelux](https://modrinth.com/mod/scalablelux) [lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium),[bad optimizations,](https://modrinth.com/mod/badoptimizations) [immediatelyfast,](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) [noysium forked,](https://modrinth.com/mod/noisiumforked)[modern fix,](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix-mvus) [LazyDFU Reloaded](https://modrinth.com/mod/lazydfu-reloaded) as well as several other General optimizations. it also includes iris for shaders and zoomify.

 **it uses c2me like simply optimized so java 25 is NEEDED or this mod will likly not work**

![Hyplexly optimized V4 voxy x eclipse](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/70ece2493e239cb543a98662c778b1b40d5e42ed.png)



<details>
<summary>hyplexly optimized V3 description</summary>

Basically it's simply optimized with some **experimental performance mods** and more performance mods in general it uses a **experimental version of the nvidium mod **(with support for** 1.21.4-1.21.10**) and some more CPU Optimization attempting more multi-threading with c2me as well as async. basically this modpacks goal is to get **more FPS and More stable TPS than simply optimized** while allowing for higher settings, and a small amount of quality of life features it **is not as lightweight** as simply optimized and may break if you update any mod Individually so Please wait for a new release for new versions of sodium/voxy/nvidium as they rely on other mods to function
![V3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/800fb03899639e49f4b00b79ef02a26521df0a8d.png)


</details>


<details>
<summary>Performance</summary>

The performance is very similar to Simply optimized I get about **1,100** fps on my rtx 3050 laptop using simply optimized. But using perfectly optimized I can get up to **1,300** fps on 32+ rd (render distance) with relatively similar performance on up to 50 rd (bobby/Voxy/Distant Horizons chunks) with simply optimized not even allowing rd over 32

Requirements: for best performance **use a gtx 1660 or better.** (3gb+ Vram) AMD GPUs will also work fine but will **not use nvidium mod** use 8-16 gb of ram for higher rd expect around 90-400fps+

**Minimum specs**: gt730 (2gb Vram) 5gb ram dedicated to instance any cpu with 2 cores over 1.9ghz should perform fine but don't expect over 70 fps 
 
**my specs** 
amd r7 6800H 
32gb ddr5 4800 MT/s (20gb dedicated) 
RTX 3050 ti (laptop) :4gb (2gb usable)
samsung ssd 970 evo plus (1TB) 

fps 200-1380

Vanilla FPS 60-90
